CustomField.description: Hard FRA statutory deadline: nepa_start_date__c + 365 days for EA, + 730 days for EIS, per 42 U.S.C. 4336a. This is a legal constraint, not a project management guideline. Set by NEPA_SLA_Due_Date_Setter alongside nepa_sla_due_date__c. Stored separately from the SLA due date so that clock-pause extensions are visible without overwriting the original statutory date.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: FRA hard deadline: 1 year (EA) or 2 years (EIS) from start date. Cannot be extended without project sponsor agreement per 42 U.S.C. 4336a(b).
CustomField.label: FRA Statutory Deadline
